# github_project_repository (Resource)

This resource links a repository to a GitHub Projects V2 project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "github_project_repository" "planning" {
  project_id = github_project.planning.id
  repository = "planning"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Node ID of the Projects V2 project.
- `repository` (String) Repository name.

### Optional

- `repository_owner` (String) Repository owner. Defaults to the provider owner.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `repository_id` (Number) Stable database ID of the repository.

## Import

Import uses the project and repository GraphQL node IDs separated by a colon:

```shell
terraform import github_project_repository.example PVT_example:R_example
```
